ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Active"), $RecordType.DeveloperName = "DrinkingWaterSourceIntake", ISBLANK(ParentAccount__c) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Open"), $RecordType.DeveloperName = "Facility", ISBLANK(ParentAccount__c) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Open"), $RecordType.DeveloperName = "PHOCSDairyFacility", ISBLANK(ParentAccount__c) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Open"), $RecordType.DeveloperName = "DrinkingWaterSystem", ISBLANK(ParentAccount__c) ) )
